objective: Execute the user-approved P0-P44 hardening loop: close control-plane and secret hygiene gaps, collect true endurance and power evidence, extend the official CUDA encoder verifier to chroma-aware YUV420, test one bounded transcode bridge, reduce producer first-row compute blocking without changing accepted matrix semantics, resolve the Regular01 review boundary, and seal the project.

entry_context.accepted_device_path: MMAPI/NVDEC block-linear NV12 main chain -> NvBufSurfTransform to pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch -> VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp -> NvBufSurfTransform back to block-linear NV12 -> NVENC
entry_context.user_authorization: The current real oral-template TXT directly authorizes execution of every P0-P44 task without another alignment pause.

global_frozen_variables: Keep resid_r15_s07 as the accepted Regular quality anchor.
Keep source_to_dest as the Regular device replay matrix convention.
Keep Running, QuickRotation, Parallax, and Crowd as challenge or diagnostic sets.
Do not revive the rejected vpi_cuda_owned_bridge_v1 route.
Do not claim zero-copy, full real-time EIS, full-pipeline acceleration, VPI optical-flow acceleration, or all-scene quality without new measured proof.
Do not commit results, raw media, review videos, the oral-template TXT, secrets, or internal original material.

task_queue.objective: Freeze Git, contract, evidence, and device-access baselines.
acceptance: branch, remote, HEAD, status, harness health, and SSH reachability recorded

task_queue.objective: Keep the real oral template local while removing it from public Git tracking.
acceptance: TXT still exists
TXT is ignored
TXT is no longer tracked
stop_reasons: operation would delete the local TXT

task_queue.objective: Close the completed P0-P12 contract.
acceptance: old contract is completed and still parses

task_queue.objective: Register this P0-P44 contract as the only active task contract.
acceptance: onboard and doctor pass
one active task contract

task_queue.objective: Verify the P0-P12 code and evidence references exist.
allowed_changes: machine-readable evidence inventory under ignored results
acceptance: all critical reports, scripts, CSVs, and review paths classified

task_queue.objective: Harden the endurance runner for mismatch, readability, ordering, and bounded output retention.
acceptance: runner records rc, success, fallback, mismatch, timing, bytes, frame readability, path order, and failure reason

task_queue.objective: Add deterministic endurance parser and summary regression tests.
acceptance: normal, fallback, mismatch, missing-timing, and failed-process cases pass
stop_reasons: no deterministic fixture can model the logs

task_queue.objective: Run Jetson endurance preflight without changing power mode or clocks.
acceptance: system, temperature, mode, disk, binaries, source, and matrix are recorded

task_queue.objective: Run a two-cycle endurance canary.
frozen_variables: same input, matrix, and alternating paths
acceptance: all rc=0, success=1, fallback=0, mismatch=0, and outputs readable

task_queue.objective: Run a true approximately 30-minute alternating endurance workload.
acceptance: about 30 minutes measured with wall and stage distributions, temperatures, activity, errors, fallback, and mismatch

task_queue.objective: Classify endurance health and tail behavior.
frozen_variables: retain failed samples and raw logs
acceptance: run count, error rate, fallback, mismatch, readability, temperature trend, and p50/p95/p99 are complete
stop_reasons: one rerun allowed only for a proven collection bug

task_queue.objective: Inventory trustworthy Jetson rail-power sources.
acceptance: rail names, units, sample rate, and board-input meaning found or unavailability proven
stop_reasons: no rail maps to a trustworthy power domain

task_queue.objective: Validate the power sampler and measurement units.
frozen_variables: same idle state and power mode
acceptance: repeated idle and warm-up samples are stable and labeled

task_queue.objective: Measure interleaved power blocks for EGLImage, stream-only, and NvBuffer paths.
frozen_variables: same source, matrix, run count, and power mode
acceptance: at least three equal blocks per path with wall, power, temperature, and activity
stop_reasons: environmental variance exceeds the path signal

task_queue.objective: Compute device-stage W, FPS, joules per frame, and FPS/W only from trustworthy rails.
acceptance: absolute values, variance, and source labels are emitted or capability boundary is explicit

task_queue.objective: Classify power evidence as positive, indistinguishable, or unavailable.
frozen_variables: small gains are valid only beyond observed noise
acceptance: measurement source and uncertainty are explicit

task_queue.objective: Audit official sample Y, U, and V plane ownership and synchronization.
acceptance: plane layout, pitch, subsampling, sync, and register order documented in evidence
stop_reasons: official source ABI differs from installed headers

task_queue.objective: Freeze chroma-aware YUV420M affine semantics.
acceptance: Y, U, V reference transforms and coordinate scaling are exact

task_queue.objective: Implement a complete YUV420M CUDA verifier patcher.
acceptance: identity, copy, translate, and affine process all three planes

task_queue.objective: Add software YUV references and per-plane correctness metrics.
acceptance: Y/U/V MAE, color drift, band coherence, and border error are measured
stop_reasons: reference and CUDA formats cannot be aligned

task_queue.objective: Validate patch syntax, idempotence, and generated-source invariants.
acceptance: py_compile, repeat patch, and source invariants pass

task_queue.objective: Build a fresh copied official verifier on Jetson.
acceptance: clean build without package or system-source changes
stop_reasons: missing API cannot be resolved minimally

task_queue.objective: Verify all-plane identity and copy.
acceptance: rc=0, 180 frames, Y/U/V reference pass, no color or tearing defect

task_queue.objective: Verify chroma-aware even-pixel translation.
acceptance: all planes match software spatial reference without tearing or color drift

task_queue.objective: Verify a bounded chroma-aware affine and collect timing.
acceptance: readable output, color and geometry reference pass, kernel and total timing recorded

task_queue.objective: Audit a supported bridge from CUDA processing back into the current transcode story.
acceptance: one concrete ownership route identified
stop_reasons: only route is already-negative or requires broad rewrite

task_queue.objective: Implement one minimal bridge sample.
acceptance: decode to supported surface to CUDA to NVENC path builds

task_queue.objective: Pass bridge identity and full-copy gates.
acceptance: rc=0, frame count correct, no green, tearing, or color drift

task_queue.objective: Pass bridge translate and affine gates.
frozen_variables: same matrices as P23 and P24
acceptance: all-plane spatial and color reference pass
task_queue.result: Array-aware translate is correct for all-intra input, but in-place modification of decoder capture DMABUF corrupts inter-frame decoder references on normal H264 and accumulates the warp. A normal-H264 bridge requires a separate encoder surface pool and broader lifecycle management.

task_queue.objective: Make a same-input bridge performance decision.
acceptance: small gain, no gain, or regression recorded honestly
task_queue.result: Same-input performance promotion is blocked because the normal-H264 correctness gate did not pass. Operator timing is retained as diagnostic evidence only.

task_queue.objective: Audit future dependencies that prevent producer committed-prefix emission.
acceptance: interpolation, limit, LP, and mask-safety future dependencies classified
stop_reasons: no safe committed prefix can be defined

task_queue.objective: Freeze the current producer output as an equivalence oracle.
acceptance: CSV hash, every matrix row, fallback, and timing baseline recorded

task_queue.objective: Extract and test prefix scheduling as a pure function.
acceptance: stride1/5, delay45/90, and tail mappings exactly match old logic

task_queue.objective: Implement opt-in incremental committed-prefix output.
acceptance: safe rows flush early and unsafe future-dependent cases fall back to batch
stop_reasons: early output requires changing matrix values

task_queue.objective: Prove incremental matrix-row equivalence locally.
acceptance: 180 row indices and values match within frozen numerical tolerance
stop_reasons: any emitted row must later be rewritten

task_queue.objective: Separate algorithm delay from extra compute startup delay.
acceptance: first observation, first solve, first row, last row, and total times recorded

task_queue.objective: Run a Jetson FIFO incremental canary.
acceptance: rc=0, fallback=0, mismatch=0, first row earlier than 15.69 seconds
stop_reasons: consumer wait failure or output mismatch

task_queue.objective: Run full-length and limited cross-clip producer no-regression validation.
acceptance: Regular05 output matches old stride5 and at least two more Regular clips stay healthy

task_queue.objective: Generate focused Regular01 evidence around the two conditional frames.
allowed_changes: review-only clip and contact sheet generation
acceptance: exact frames and short surrounding sequence are reviewable

task_queue.objective: Record the minimum Regular01 human decision.
frozen_variables: gray-threshold alone cannot reject the clip
acceptance: accepted or rejected; otherwise remains conditional
stop_reasons: user review unavailable does not block non-visual tasks
task_queue.result: The focused frame 11/13 review assets exist. No automatic hard failure is declared; Regular01 remains visual-conditional until a later user review, and this does not block the engineering closeout.

task_queue.objective: Synchronize existing control-plane and presentation files.
allowed_changes: existing benchmark, Q&A, claim, and guide files
acceptance: active state, endurance, power, CUDA, and producer wording agree

task_queue.objective: Update allowed sections of long-term context and strategic design.
frozen_variables: maintenance rules and original project objective
acceptance: stale next steps removed and high-signal outcomes recorded
stop_reasons: document permission rule forbids the edit

task_queue.objective: Run complete static, contract, test, harness, diff, and secret validation.
acceptance: JSON, tests, py_compile, onboard, doctor, claim, diff, and secret scans pass

task_queue.objective: Create logical commits without forbidden artifacts.
frozen_variables: results, raw, videos, TXT, secrets, internal originals stay out
allowed_changes: source, config, tests, and existing docs
acceptance: logical commits have the required co-author trailer
stop_reasons: secret, large artifact, or unrelated change detected

task_queue.objective: Deliver a concise evidence-backed final report in chat.
acceptance: work, verification, evidence, allowed and forbidden claims, branch, remote, commit, cleanliness, and push state reported

do_not_exit_until: all P0-P44 tasks are complete or have an evidence-backed stop reason
a user-only manual visual decision is the sole remaining task
recovery_order: project knowledge routing and public source cards
installed NVIDIA samples and VPI or MMAPI documentation
public NVIDIA documentation, forum, and sample search
bounded internal-AI prompt in chat if the technical decision still cannot be made
